column1: # sheet.fn.logical.ifs golden corpus (spec §7, §11; Microsoft IFS public docs).
# IFS(condition1, value1, [condition2, value2], …) returns the value paired
# with the first TRUE condition. Conditions coerce via to_bool (number != 0 is
# TRUE; only the literal words TRUE/FALSE coerce from text). Rulings: no TRUE
# condition -> #N/A (no default slot, unlike IF); an odd argument count (a
# dangling final condition) -> #N/A; an error in a condition propagates (first-
# condition-error-wins); non-boolean text in a condition -> #VALUE!.
# Args use ';' as the separator (the family decoder splits on ';').
